Clients only need to send value sets and codesystems once; there after tehy are automatically in scope for calls with the same cache-id. The cache is retained for 30 min from last call"/></parameter><parameter><name value="tx-resource"/><documentation value="Additional valuesets needed for evaluation e.g. value sets referred to from the import statement of the value set being expanded"/></parameter></expansion></TerminologyCapabilities>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Parameters xmlns="http://hl7.org/fhir"><parameter><name value="coding"/><valueCoding><system value="http://unstats.un.org/unsd/methods/m49/m49.htm"/><code value="001"/></valueCoding></parameter><parameter><name value="valueSetMode"/><valueString value="NO_MEMBERSHIP_CHECK"/></parameter><parameter><name value="default-to-latest-version"/><valueBoolean value="true"/></parameter><parameter><name value="valueSet"/><resource><ValueSet><id value="jurisdiction"/><meta><lastUpdated value="2019-11-01T09:29:23.356+11:00"/><profile value="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/shareablevalueset"/></meta><extension url="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/structuredefinition-wg"><valueCode value="vocab"/></extension><extension url="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/structuredefinition-standards-status"><valueCode value="normative"/></extension><extension url="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/structuredefinition-fmm"><valueInteger value="5"/></extension><extension url="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/structuredefinition-normative-version"><valueCode value="4.0.0"/></extension><url value="http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/jurisdiction"/><identifier><system value="urn:ietf:rfc:3986"/><value value="urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.4.642.3.48"/></identifier><version value="4.0.1"/><name value="Jurisdiction ValueSet"/><title value="Jurisdiction"/><status value="active"/><experimental value="false"/><date value="2019-11-01T09:29:23+11:00"/><publisher value="FHIR Project team"/><contact><telecom><system value="url"/><value value="http://hl7.org/fhir"/></telecom></contact><description value="This value set defines a base set of codes for country, country subdivision and region    for indicating where a resource is intended to be used.   &#xD;&#xA;   &#xD;&#xA;   Note: The codes for countries and country subdivisions are taken from    [ISO 3166](https://www.iso.org/iso-3166-country-codes.html)    while the codes for &quot;supra-national&quot; regions are from    [UN Standard country or area codes for statistical use (M49)](http://unstats.un.org/unsd/methods/m49/m49.htm)."/><compose><include><system value="urn:iso:std:iso:3166"/></include><include><system value="urn:iso:std:iso:3166:-2"/></include><include><system value="http://unstats.un.org/unsd/methods/m49/m49.htm"/><filter><property value="class"/><op value="="/><value value="region"/></filter></include></compose></ValueSet></resource></parameter><parameter><name value="cache-id"/><valueString value="2e06af3b-7a23-4c08-8bab-e22dfa18c305"/></parameter><parameter><name value="profile"/><resource><Parameters><parameter><name value="x-system-cache-id"/><valueString value="dc8fd4bc-091a-424a-8a3b-6198ef146891"/></parameter></Parameters></resource></parameter></Parameters>

value="EmCare.B12S1.DE10"/><display value="Skin Problem"/><designation><value value="The client is reported to have or is observed to have skin pain or problem"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B12S1.DE11"/><display value="Ear Pain"/><designation><value value="The client is reported to have or has had ear pain"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B12S1.DE12"/><display value="Other"/><designation><value value="The client is reported to have or has had another type of pain"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="no_pain"/><display value="No Pain"/><designation><value value="The client is reported to have no pain"/></designation></concept></include></compose></ValueSet></resource></parameter><parameter><name value="_limit"/><valueString value="1000"/></parameter><parameter><name <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Parameters xmlns="http://hl7.org/fhir"><parameter><name value="x-system-cache-id"/><valueString value="dc8fd4bc-091a-424a-8a3b-6198ef146891"/></parameter><parameter><name value="includeDefinition"/><valueBoolean value="false"/></parameter><parameter><name value="excludeNested"/><valueBoolean value="true"/></parameter><parameter><name value="valueSet"/><resource><ValueSet><status value="active"/><compose><inactive value="true"/><include><system value="https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes"/><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE10"/><display value="Possible Serious Abscess - Hot Tender Swelling"/><designation><value value="The client has a possible serious abscess - Hot tender swelling"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE11"/><display value="Cellulitis - Red Tender Skin"/><designation><value value="The client has Cellulitis - Red tender skin"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE12"/><display value="Papular Itching Rash(Prurigo) - Itching rash with small papules and scratch marks. Dark spots with pale centre"/><designation><value value="The client has Papular Itching Rash(Prurigo) - itching rash with small papules and scratch marks. Dark spots with pale centre"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE13"/><display value="Ringworm (Tinea) - An itchy circular lesion with a raised edge and fine scaly area in the centre with loss of hair.  May also be found on body or web on feet"/><designation><value value="The client has Ringworm (Tinea) - An itchy circular lesion with a raised edge and fine scaly area in the centre with loss of hair.  May also be found on body or web on feet"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE14"/><display value="Scabies - Rash and excoriations on torso; burrows in web space and wrists, face spared"/><designation><value value="The client has Scabies - Rash and excoriations on torso; burrows in web space and wrists, face spared"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE15"/><display value="Chickenpox - Vesicles over body.  Vesicles appear progressively over days and form scabs after they rupture"/><designation><value value="The client has Chickenpox - Vesicles over body.  Vesicles appear progressively over days and form scabs after they rupture"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE16"/><display value="Herpes Zoster -  Vesicles in one area on one side of body with intense pain or scars plus shooting pain.  Uncommon in children except where they are immuno-compromised (e.g. if infected with HIV)"/><designation><value value="The client has Herpes Zoster -  Vesicles in one area on one side of body with intense pain or scars plus shooting pain.  Uncommon in children except where they are immuno-compromised (e.g. if infected with HIV)"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE17"/><display value="Impetigo / Folliculitis - Red, Tender, Warm Crusts or Small lesions"/><designation><value value="The client has Impetigo / Folliculitis - Red, Tender, Warm Crusts or Small lesions"/></designation></concept></include></compose></ValueSet></resource></parameter><parameter><name value="_limit"/><valueString value="1000"/></parameter><parameter><name value="_incomplete"/><valueString value="true"/></parameter></Parameters>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Parameters xmlns="http://hl7.org/fhir"><parameter><name value="x-system-cache-id"/><valueString value="dc8fd4bc-091a-424a-8a3b-6198ef146891"/></parameter><parameter><name value="includeDefinition"/><valueBoolean value="false"/></parameter><parameter><name value="excludeNested"/><valueBoolean value="true"/></parameter><parameter><name value="valueSet"/><resource><ValueSet><status value="active"/><compose><inactive value="true"/><include><system value="https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes"/><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE19"/><display value="Skin Lesions ≥ 4 cm"/><designation><value value="The client has Skin Lesions ≥ 4 cm"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE20"/><display value="Red Skin Streaks"/><designation><value value="The client has red skin streaks"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE21"/><display value="Tender Nodes (Nodules) under the skin"/><designation><value value="The client has tender nodes (nodules) under the skin that can appear on any part of the face or body"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE22"/><display value="Skin Infection extends to Muscle"/><designation><value value="The client has skin infection that extends to muscle"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE23"/><display value="Molluscum Contagiosum - Skin coloured pearly white papules with central umbilication. Most commonly seen on face and trunk in children."/><designation><value value="The client has Molluscum Contagiosum - Skin coloured pearly white papules with central umbilication. Most commonly seen on face and trunk in children."/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE24"/><display value="Warts - Papules or nodules with a rough (Verrucous) surface"/><designation><value value="The client has Warts - Papules or nodules with a rough (Verrucous) surface"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE25"/><display value="Seborrhea - Greasy scales and redness on central face and body folds"/><designation><value value="The client has Seborrhea - Greasy scales and redness on central face and body folds"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE26"/><display value="Fixed Drug Reactions - Generalised red, wide spread with small bumps or blisters; or one or more dark skin areas"/><designation><value value="The client has Fixed Drug Reactions - Generalised red, wide spread with small bumps or blisters; or one or more dark skin areas"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE27"/><display value="Eczema - Wet oozing sores or excoriated, thick patches"/><designation><value value="The client has Eczema - Wet oozing sores or excoriated, thick patches"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE28"/><display value="Steven Johnson Syndrome - Severe reaction due to cotrimoxazole or NVP involving the skin as well as the eyes and the mouth.  Might cause difficulty in breathing"/><designation><value value="The client has Steven Johnson Syndrome - Severe reaction due to cotrimoxazole or NVP involving the skin as well as the eyes and the mouth.  Might cause difficulty in breathing"/></designation></concept></include></compose></ValueSet></resource></parameter><parameter><name value="_limit"/><valueString value="1000"/></parameter><parameter><name value="_incomplete"/><valueString value="true"/></parameter></Parameters>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Parameters xmlns="http://hl7.org/fhir"><parameter><name value="x-system-cache-id"/><valueString value="dc8fd4bc-091a-424a-8a3b-6198ef146891"/></parameter><parameter><name value="includeDefinition"/><valueBoolean value="false"/></parameter><parameter><name value="excludeNested"/><valueBoolean value="true"/></parameter><parameter><name value="valueSet"/><resource><ValueSet><id value="severe-impetigo"/><text><status value="generated"/><div xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml"><ul><li>Include these codes as defined in <code>https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes</code><table class="none"><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap"><b>Code</b></td><td><b>Display</b></td></tr><tr><td>EmCare.B14S2.DE19</td><td>Skin Lesions ≥ 4 cm</td></tr><tr><td>EmCare.B14S2.DE20</td><td>Red Skin Streaks</td></tr><tr><td>EmCare.B14S2.DE21</td><td>Tender Nodes (Nodules) under the skin</td></tr><tr><td>EmCare.B14S2.DE22</td><td>Skin Infection extends to Muscle</td></tr><tr><td>EmCare.B14S2.DE23</td><td>Molluscum Contagiosum - Skin coloured pearly white papules with central umbilication. Most commonly seen on face and trunk in children.</td></tr><tr><td>EmCare.B14S2.DE24</td><td>Warts - Papules or nodules with a rough (Verrucous) surface</td></tr><tr><td>EmCare.B14S2.DE25</td><td>Seborrhea - Greasy scales and redness on central face and body folds</td></tr><tr><td>EmCare.B14S2.DE26</td><td>Fixed Drug Reactions - Generalised red, wide spread with small bumps or blisters; or one or more dark skin areas</td></tr><tr><td>EmCare.B14S2.DE27</td><td>Eczema - Wet oozing sores or excoriated, thick patches</td></tr><tr><td>EmCare.B14S2.DE28</td><td>Steven Johnson Syndrome - Severe reaction due to cotrimoxazole or NVP involving the skin as well as the eyes and the mouth.  Might cause difficulty in breathing</td></tr></table></li></ul></div></text><url value="https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/ValueSet/severe-impetigo"/><version value="0.1.0"/><name value="valueset-severe-impetigo"/><title value="Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth"/><status value="draft"/><experimental value="false"/><date value="2022-04-21T10:41:40+00:00"/><publisher value="World Health Organization (WHO)"/><contact><telecom><system value="url"/><value value="https://www.who.int"/></telecom></contact><description value="Codes representing possible values for the Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth element"/><jurisdiction><coding><system value="http://unstats.un.org/unsd/methods/m49/m49.htm"/><code value="001"/></coding></jurisdiction><immutable value="true"/><compose><include><system value="https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes"/><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE19"/><display value="Skin Lesions ≥ 4 cm"/><designation><value value="The client has Skin Lesions ≥ 4 cm"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE20"/><display value="Red Skin Streaks"/><designation><value value="The client has red skin streaks"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE21"/><display value="Tender Nodes (Nodules) under the skin"/><designation><value value="The client has tender nodes (nodules) under the skin that can appear on any part of the face or body"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE22"/><display value="Skin Infection extends to Muscle"/><designation><value value="The client has skin infection that extends to muscle"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE23"/><display value="Molluscum Contagiosum - Skin coloured pearly white papules with central umbilication. Most commonly seen on face and trunk in children."/><designation><value value="The client has Molluscum Contagiosum - Skin coloured pearly white papules with central umbilication. Most commonly seen on face and trunk in children."/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE24"/><display value="Warts - Papules or nodules with a rough (Verrucous) surface"/><designation><value value="The client has Warts - Papules or nodules with a rough (Verrucous) surface"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE25"/><display value="Seborrhea - Greasy scales and redness on central face and body folds"/><designation><value value="The client has Seborrhea - Greasy scales and redness on central face and body folds"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE26"/><display value="Fixed Drug Reactions - Generalised red, wide spread with small bumps or blisters; or one or more dark skin areas"/><designation><value value="The client has Fixed Drug Reactions - Generalised red, wide spread with small bumps or blisters; or one or more dark skin areas"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE27"/><display value="Eczema - Wet oozing sores or excoriated, thick patches"/><designation><value value="The client has Eczema - Wet oozing sores or excoriated, thick patches"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE28"/><display value="Steven Johnson Syndrome - Severe reaction due to cotrimoxazole or NVP involving the skin as well as the eyes and the mouth.  Might cause difficulty in breathing"/><designation><value value="The client has Steven Johnson Syndrome - Severe reaction due to cotrimoxazole or NVP involving the skin as well as the eyes and the mouth.  Might cause difficulty in breathing"/></designation></concept></include></compose></ValueSet></resource></parameter><parameter><name value="_limit"/><valueString value="1000"/></parameter><parameter><name value="_incomplete"/><valueString value="true"/></parameter></Parameters>

assumes vomits everything/unable to drink"/><designation><value value="The health care worker is unable to perform test on the client therefore the health care worker should assume the client vomits everything or is unable to drink"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="fluid_test_passed"/><display value="Successful"/><designation><value value="The client passes the fluid test"/></designation></concept></include></compose></ValueSet></resource></parameter><parameter><name value="_limit"/><valueString value="1000"/></parameter><parameter><name value="_incomplete"/><valueString value="true"/></parameter></Parameters>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Parameters xmlns="http://hl7.org/fhir"><parameter><name value="x-system-cache-id"/><valueString value="dc8fd4bc-091a-424a-8a3b-6198ef146891"/></parameter><parameter><name value="includeDefinition"/><valueBoolean value="false"/></parameter><parameter><name value="excludeNested"/><valueBoolean value="false"/></parameter><parameter><name value="valueSet"/><resource><ValueSet><status value="active"/><compose><inactive value="true"/><include><system value="https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes"/><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE10"/><display value="Possible Serious Abscess - Hot Tender Swelling"/><designation><value value="The client has a possible serious abscess - Hot tender swelling"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE11"/><display value="Cellulitis - Red Tender Skin"/><designation><value value="The client has Cellulitis - Red tender skin"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE12"/><display value="Papular Itching Rash(Prurigo) - Itching rash with small papules and scratch marks. Dark spots with pale centre"/><designation><value value="The client has Papular Itching Rash(Prurigo) - itching rash with small papules and scratch marks. Dark spots with pale centre"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE13"/><display value="Ringworm (Tinea) - An itchy circular lesion with a raised edge and fine scaly area in the centre with loss of hair.  May also be found on body or web on feet"/><designation><value value="The client has Ringworm (Tinea) - An itchy circular lesion with a raised edge and fine scaly area in the centre with loss of hair.  May also be found on body or web on feet"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE14"/><display value="Scabies - Rash and excoriations on torso; burrows in web space and wrists, face spared"/><designation><value value="The client has Scabies - Rash and excoriations on torso; burrows in web space and wrists, face spared"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE15"/><display value="Chickenpox - Vesicles over body.  Vesicles appear progressively over days and form scabs after they rupture"/><designation><value value="The client has Chickenpox - Vesicles over body.  Vesicles appear progressively over days and form scabs after they rupture"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE16"/><display value="Herpes Zoster -  Vesicles in one area on one side of body with intense pain or scars plus shooting pain.  Uncommon in children except where they are immuno-compromised (e.g. if infected with HIV)"/><designation><value value="The client has Herpes Zoster -  Vesicles in one area on one side of body with intense pain or scars plus shooting pain.  Uncommon in children except where they are immuno-compromised (e.g. if infected with HIV)"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE17"/><display value="Impetigo / Folliculitis - Red, Tender, Warm Crusts or Small lesions"/><designation><value value="The client has Impetigo / Folliculitis - Red, Tender, Warm Crusts or Small lesions"/></designation></concept></include></compose></ValueSet></resource></parameter><parameter><name value="_limit"/><valueString value="1000"/></parameter><parameter><name value="_incomplete"/><valueString value="true"/></parameter></Parameters>

Dark spots with pale centre</td></tr><tr><td>EmCare.B14S2.DE13</td><td>Ringworm (Tinea) - An itchy circular lesion with a raised edge and fine scaly area in the centre with loss of hair.  May also be found on body or web on feet</td></tr><tr><td>EmCare.B14S2.DE14</td><td>Scabies - Rash and excoriations on torso; burrows in web space and wrists, face spared</td></tr><tr><td>EmCare.B14S2.DE15</td><td>Chickenpox - Vesicles over body.  Vesicles appear progressively over days and form scabs after they rupture</td></tr><tr><td>EmCare.B14S2.DE16</td><td>Herpes Zoster -  Vesicles in one area on one side of body with intense pain or scars plus shooting pain.  Uncommon in children except where they are immuno-compromised (e.g. if infected with HIV)</td></tr><tr><td>EmCare.B14S2.DE17</td><td>Impetigo / Folliculitis - Red, Tender, Warm Crusts or Small lesions</td></tr></table></li></ul></div></text><url value="https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/ValueSet/skin-pb"/><version value="0.1.0"/><name value="valueset-skin-pb"/><title value="Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth"/><status value="draft"/><experimental value="false"/><date value="2022-04-21T10:41:40+00:00"/><publisher value="World Health Organization (WHO)"/><contact><telecom><system value="url"/><value value="https://www.who.int"/></telecom></contact><description value="Codes representing possible values for the Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth element"/><jurisdiction><coding><system value="http://unstats.un.org/unsd/methods/m49/m49.htm"/><code value="001"/></coding></jurisdiction><immutable value="true"/><compose><include><system value="https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes"/><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE10"/><display value="Possible Serious Abscess - Hot Tender Swelling"/><designation><value value="The client has a possible serious abscess - Hot tender swelling"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE11"/><display value="Cellulitis - Red Tender Skin"/><designation><value value="The client has Cellulitis - Red tender skin"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE12"/><display value="Papular Itching Rash(Prurigo) - Itching rash with small papules and scratch marks. Most commonly seen on face and trunk in children."/><designation><value value="The client has Molluscum Contagiosum - Skin coloured pearly white papules with central umbilication. Most commonly seen on face and trunk in children."/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE24"/><display value="Warts - Papules or nodules with a rough (Verrucous) surface"/><designation><value value="The client has Warts - Papules or nodules with a rough (Verrucous) surface"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE25"/><display value="Seborrhea - Greasy scales and redness on central face and body folds"/><designation><value value="The client has Seborrhea - Greasy scales and redness on central face and body folds"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE26"/><display value="Fixed Drug Reactions - Generalised red, wide spread with small bumps or blisters; or one or more dark skin areas"/><designation><value value="The client has Fixed Drug Reactions - Generalised red, wide spread with small bumps or blisters; or one or more dark skin areas"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE27"/><display value="Eczema - Wet oozing sores or excoriated, thick patches"/><designation><value value="The client has Eczema - Wet oozing sores or excoriated, thick patches"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE28"/><display value="Steven Johnson Syndrome - Severe reaction due to cotrimoxazole or NVP involving the skin as well as the eyes and the mouth.  Might cause difficulty in breathing"/><designation><value value="The client has Steven Johnson Syndrome - Severe reaction due to cotrimoxazole or NVP involving the skin as well as the eyes and the mouth. <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Parameters xmlns="http://hl7.org/fhir"><parameter><name value="x-system-cache-id"/><valueString value="dc8fd4bc-091a-424a-8a3b-6198ef146891"/></parameter><parameter><name value="includeDefinition"/><valueBoolean value="false"/></parameter><parameter><name value="excludeNested"/><valueBoolean value="false"/></parameter><parameter><name value="valueSet"/><resource><ValueSet><status value="active"/><compose><inactive value="true"/><include><system value="https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/codesystem-emcare-custom-codes"/><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE19"/><display value="Skin Lesions ≥ 4 cm"/><designation><value value="The client has Skin Lesions ≥ 4 cm"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE20"/><display value="Red Skin Streaks"/><designation><value value="The client has red skin streaks"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE21"/><display value="Tender Nodes (Nodules) under the skin"/><designation><value value="The client has tender nodes (nodules) under the skin that can appear on any part of the face or body"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE22"/><display value="Skin Infection extends to Muscle"/><designation><value value="The client has skin infection that extends to muscle"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE23"/><display value="Molluscum Contagiosum - Skin coloured pearly white papules with central umbilication. Most commonly seen on face and trunk in children."/><designation><value value="The client has Molluscum Contagiosum - Skin coloured pearly white papules with central umbilication. Most commonly seen on face and trunk in children."/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE24"/><display value="Warts - Papules or nodules with a rough (Verrucous) surface"/><designation><value value="The client has Warts - Papules or nodules with a rough (Verrucous) surface"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE25"/><display value="Seborrhea - Greasy scales and redness on central face and body folds"/><designation><value value="The client has Seborrhea - Greasy scales and redness on central face and body folds"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE26"/><display value="Fixed Drug Reactions - Generalised red, wide spread with small bumps or blisters; or one or more dark skin areas"/><designation><value value="The client has Fixed Drug Reactions - Generalised red, wide spread with small bumps or blisters; or one or more dark skin areas"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE27"/><display value="Eczema - Wet oozing sores or excoriated, thick patches"/><designation><value value="The client has Eczema - Wet oozing sores or excoriated, thick patches"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE28"/><display value="Steven Johnson Syndrome - Severe reaction due to cotrimoxazole or NVP involving the skin as well as the eyes and the mouth.  Might cause difficulty in breathing"/><designation><value value="The client has Steven Johnson Syndrome - Severe reaction due to cotrimoxazole or NVP involving the skin as well as the eyes and the mouth.  Might cause difficulty in breathing"/></designation></concept></include></compose></ValueSet></resource></parameter><parameter><name value="_limit"/><valueString value="1000"/></parameter><parameter><name value="_incomplete"/><valueString value="true"/></parameter></Parameters>

Most commonly seen on face and trunk in children.</td></tr><tr><td>EmCare.B14S2.DE24</td><td>Warts - Papules or nodules with a rough (Verrucous) surface</td></tr><tr><td>EmCare.B14S2.DE25</td><td>Seborrhea - Greasy scales and redness on central face and body folds</td></tr><tr><td>EmCare.B14S2.DE26</td><td>Fixed Drug Reactions - Generalised red, wide spread with small bumps or blisters; or one or more dark skin areas</td></tr><tr><td>EmCare.B14S2.DE27</td><td>Eczema - Wet oozing sores or excoriated, thick patches</td></tr><tr><td>EmCare.B14S2.DE28</td><td>Steven Johnson Syndrome - Severe reaction due to cotrimoxazole or NVP involving the skin as well as the eyes and the mouth.  Might cause difficulty in breathing</td></tr></table></li></ul></div></text><url value="https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/ValueSet/valueset-severe-impetigo-"/><version value="0.1.0"/><name value="valueset-severe-impetigo-"/><title value="Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth"/><status value="draft"/><experimental value="false"/><date value="2022-04-21T10:41:40+00:00"/><publisher value="World Health Organization (WHO)"/><contact><telecom><system value="url"/><value value="https://www.who.int"/></telecom></contact><description value="Codes representing possible values for the Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth element"/><jurisdiction><coding><system value="http://unstats.un.org/unsd/methods/m49/m49.htm"/><code value="001"/></coding></jurisdiction><immutable value="true"/><compose><include><system value="https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/codesystem-emcare-custom-codes"/><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE19"/><display value="Skin Lesions ≥ 4 cm"/><designation><value value="The client has Skin Lesions ≥ 4 cm"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE20"/><display value="Red Skin Streaks"/><designation><value value="The client has red skin streaks"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE21"/><display value="Tender Nodes (Nodules) under the skin"/><designation><value value="The client has tender nodes (nodules) under the skin that can appear on any part of the face or body"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE22"/><display value="Skin Infection extends to Muscle"/><designation><value value="The client has skin infection that extends to muscle"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B14S2.DE23"/><display value="Molluscum Contagiosum - Skin coloured pearly white papules with central umbilication. <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Parameters xmlns="http://hl7.org/fhir"><parameter><name value="x-system-cache-id"/><valueString value="dc8fd4bc-091a-424a-8a3b-6198ef146891"/></parameter><parameter><name value="includeDefinition"/><valueBoolean value="false"/></parameter><parameter><name value="excludeNested"/><valueBoolean value="false"/></parameter><parameter><name value="valueSet"/><resource><ValueSet><status value="active"/><compose><inactive value="true"/><include><system value="https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes"/><concept><code value="EmCare.B7.DE15"/><display value="Vomits immediately / everything"/><designation><value value="The client vomits immediately / everything"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B7.DE16"/><display value="Completely unable to drink"/><designation><value value="The client is completely unable to drink"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B7.DE17"/><display value="Drinks poorly"/><designation><value value="The client drinks poorly"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B7.DE18"/><display value="Drinks eagerly / thirstily"/><designation><value value="The client drinks eagerly / thirstily"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B7.DE19"/><display value="Drinks normally"/><designation><value value="The client drinks normally"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B7.DE20"/><display value="Unable to perform test - assumes vomits everything/unable to drink"/><designation><value value="The health care worker is unable to perform test on the client therefore the health care worker should assume the client vomits everything or is unable to drink"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="fluid_test_passed"/><display value="Successful"/><designation><value value="The client passes the fluid test"/></designation></concept></include></compose></ValueSet></resource></parameter><parameter><name value="_limit"/><valueString value="1000"/></parameter><parameter><name value="_incomplete"/><valueString value="true"/></parameter></Parameters>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><Parameters xmlns="http://hl7.org/fhir"><parameter><name value="x-system-cache-id"/><valueString value="dc8fd4bc-091a-424a-8a3b-6198ef146891"/></parameter><parameter><name value="includeDefinition"/><valueBoolean value="false"/></parameter><parameter><name value="excludeNested"/><valueBoolean value="false"/></parameter><parameter><name value="incomplete-ok"/><valueBoolean value="true"/></parameter><parameter><name value="valueSet"/><resource><ValueSet><id value="fluid-test"/><text><status value="generated"/><div xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml"><ul><li>Include these codes as defined in <code>https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes</code><table class="none"><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap"><b>Code</b></td><td><b>Display</b></td></tr><tr><td>EmCare.B7.DE15</td><td>Vomits immediately / everything</td></tr><tr><td>EmCare.B7.DE16</td><td>Completely unable to drink</td></tr><tr><td>EmCare.B7.DE17</td><td>Drinks poorly</td></tr><tr><td>EmCare.B7.DE18</td><td>Drinks eagerly / thirstily</td></tr><tr><td>EmCare.B7.DE19</td><td>Drinks normally</td></tr><tr><td>EmCare.B7.DE20</td><td>Unable to perform test - assumes vomits everything/unable to drink</td></tr><tr><td>fluid_test_passed</td><td>Successful</td></tr></table></li></ul></div></text><url value="https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/ValueSet/fluid-test"/><version value="0.1.0"/><name value="valueset-fluid-test"/><title value="Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth"/><status value="draft"/><experimental value="false"/><date value="2022-04-21T10:41:40+00:00"/><publisher value="World Health Organization (WHO)"/><contact><telecom><system value="url"/><value value="https://www.who.int"/></telecom></contact><description value="Codes representing possible values for the Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth element"/><jurisdiction><coding><system value="http://unstats.un.org/unsd/methods/m49/m49.htm"/><code value="001"/></coding></jurisdiction><immutable value="true"/><compose><include><system value="https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes"/><concept><code value="EmCare.B7.DE15"/><display value="Vomits immediately / everything"/><designation><value value="The client vomits immediately / everything"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B7.DE16"/><display value="Completely unable to drink"/><designation><value value="The client is completely unable to drink"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B7.DE17"/><display value="Drinks poorly"/><designation><value value="The client drinks poorly"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B7.DE18"/><display value="Drinks eagerly / thirstily"/><designation><value value="The client drinks eagerly / thirstily"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B7.DE19"/><display value="Drinks normally"/><designation><value value="The client drinks normally"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="EmCare.B7.DE20"/><display value="Unable to perform test - assumes vomits everything/unable to drink"/><designation><value value="The health care worker is unable to perform test on the client therefore the health care worker should assume the client vomits everything or is unable to drink"/></designation></concept><concept><code value="fluid_test_passed"/><display value="Successful"/><designation><value value="The client passes the fluid test"/></designation></concept></include></compose></ValueSet></resource></parameter><parameter><name value="_limit"/><valueString value="1000"/></parameter><parameter><name value="_incomplete"/><valueString value="true"/></parameter></Parameters>
